last_result: Hydra-MIP deep reading mapped pairwise non-uniform selector loss to a future development-only selector-v2 arm: preserve the full per-instance expert loss matrix, compare unweighted and cost-weighted pairwise selectors on identical disjoint folds, and gate on realized objective, regret and worst environment rather than classification accuracy. Multi-candidate pool expansion remains a separate controlled-budget axis because the paper reports a negative dataset. Frozen CVRP v1 and confirmation remain unchanged.
